summary: Raw audience tape with an uneven mix that still captures the show’s vibe; “The Stranger” shines.
review: This audience recording delivers the feeling of the night despite a noticeable imbalance—Brent’s keys often drown out Jerry’s guitar. The mix is imperfect, but fans will appreciate the energy and especially enjoy the standout performance of “The Stranger.”

ai_rating.rationale: Only one moderate‑rating (3★) review; shows are described as enjoyable but hampered by mix imbalance, leading to an overall average score.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Typical audience tape quirks with a pronounced mix imbalance (Brent louder than Jerry), but retains the live atmosphere.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Not specifically discussed; reviewers focus on overall feeling rather than set pacing.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Often buried in the mix, quieter compared to Brent on some songs.
band_member_comments.Keys: Brent’s keyboards are noticeably louder at times, creating an uneven balance.
